accurate.why: All program descriptions and contextual information are accurate; the summary correctly describes what each extended program does.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated or incorrect claims; contextual descriptions of programs (e.g., EAS history, remote tower definition) are accurate.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the act temporarily extends specific FAA programs and activities through May 10, 2024.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Describes all sections as extending prior statutory authorities, correctly characterizing the act as amending existing law.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes section-specific conditions and program requirements throughout.

effective_dates.why: Consistently notes May 10, 2024, extension dates and May 11 where applicable.

major_provisions_covered.why: Comprehensively covers all three titles and virtually all individual provisions with section-by-section analysis.

coherent.why: Well-organized by section with clear structure.

concise.why: Extremely detailed section-by-section analysis; comprehensive but far longer than necessary for a summary — more appropriate as a full CRS analysis than a brief summary.

correct_entities.why: All agencies, programs, and statutes correctly named throughout.

correct_figures.why: Does not state specific dollar amounts in this summary.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
